title: Using Number column totals in Charts on a dashboard
excerpt:
Hi, is there any way in which you can use total shown at the bottom of a numbers column to generate a chart to be displayed in a second screen or a dashboard? 
I have tried many ways to see if this can happen but can’t q…

posts.author: Josh.Smallwood (Josh Smallwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, is there any way in which you can use total shown at the bottom of a numbers column to generate a chart to be displayed in a second screen or a dashboard?

I have tried many ways to see if this can happen but can’t quite find the solution.

Thanks
